external_hybrid_reference.measurement_caveat: signed PCM24 external render with a reported mandatory one-LSB TPDF path; long -120 dB decay is floor-sensitive

configuration.passband_gain_control: each measured impulse is DC-normalized to the common integer interpolation ratio
configuration.transition_bandwidth_control: intrinsic production response; common rates and 20 kHz analysis band, with no additional equalizer
configuration.packet_alignment: historical quadrature-envelope centroid plus principal-peak nominal onset bounds
configuration.group_delay_method: local linear derivative of the unwrapped transfer-function phase
configuration.reconstruction_filter: the production SincResampler path only; no secondary reconstruction filter
configuration.analysis_window: full fixed guard plus tail capture; 10 ms threshold hold for decay censoring

capacity_conclusion.reason: P8/P9 already exact-tested 262,145, 524,289, and 1,048,577 taps for the same target. Timing was invariant at about 1e-12, packet movement stayed below 2.13e-10 dB, and rejection changed by less than 2e-6 dB; support is not the active constraint.

decision.reason: P17 Pareto-dominates E2v3 on every frozen impulse/step metric, passes all production and holdout packets, preserves the phase-only frequency response and integer runtime contract, and improves every matched exact DSD128 restart-excess cell over P6.
